6/15/2017 Megalodon Marketing Mail - action plan / proposal email

Jeremy Haynes <jeremy@megalodon.marketing>
action plan / proposal email
Jeremy Haynes <jeremy@megalodon.marketing> 	Thu, Jun 15, 2017 at 11:34 AM
To: Jeremy Haynes <jeremy@megalodon.marketing>
I've built this based on our conversation and the preliminary research i've done on you, your current positioning, and the
current ventures you're involved with to drive you more leads, sales and impact int he market while keeping a positive and
growing brand:
Creative Phase
We’ll have a strategy session together with my team on the line after we sign our agreement together to go
over the action plan with you and calibrate expectations and what we may need further to take massive
action right away
We need to build assets for you.
We will need to gather assets from you like high quality photos, quotes to use for image quotes, and
we’ll need to gather any video footage of you that could help for positioning
after we have those assets, we will create the content for the different social mediums, we’ll create
image quotes, videos with captions, gifs and other content that we will post on your behalf after you
approve of course on channels like Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter and any others that may
be applicable to you.
Dependent on if you’re going to want to train your current downline and future downline and
increase your report and impact to your team we may need to outline, script and then create the
information product outline
this will include us creating an outline for the product, the landing page and thank you page,
and the marketing automation (emails and ads) to complete the product.
We’ll create the blog and add it on to your current website
if you don't have a current website, we can create one for you and add a blog to it.
we’ll create the blogs for you as well, or will touch up the ones you create if you want to
maintain creative control
This phase should take less than a week and a half if we move quick on getting the assets from you up
front to create these assets, and also dependent on approval time from you telling us we’re good to go.
Approval Phase
After we’ve created the assets we need to take action, we’ll get your final approval on not just the creative
content, but also the copy that will be used for each post to ensure we’re getting your voice and your
brands voice right the first time around so you can take yourself out of the smaller cycles you can trust us
to handle for you.
If you can approve the website quickly and blogs quickly in the same timeline as the social media content,
we can get your final approval and launch this set of assets in the same window.
Launch And Position Phase
Once everything is approved by you, we launch.
We post all of the content created across the different social channels we’re representing you on
We launch the ads for the information product if we create the product together to drive traffic to the
site to convert into customers
We’ll launch the website and blog, and will also promote that content on social media and through
ads to drive traffic to it
The biggest intention of this phase is to drive results to your business. We’re looking to drive
leads, sales, customers and higher paying customers into your business based on what we create
together and launch in this phase.
Growth Phase
All of the actions we’ve taken together and all of the ads and assets we’ve launched into the market by this
phase will have given us plenty of data to go off of to ensure we can make real time changes and
adjustments to what we’re doing to get better in real time.
This means that if people are converting at 10% on the landing pages or offer pages we’ve built,
we’ll make changes to it with the intention of getting the conversion % to 12% and so forth.
This means that if image quotes are doing better than gifs, we’ll create more image quotes rather
than gifs.
If we’re seeing success with boosting video content on Facebook and then following up those video
viewers with a Facebook ad to convert on an offer mentioned in the video they had watched, we will
